narrative:
Prairie Township has 11,186 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
